title: Hot vs. cold context isn't about time — it's about whether it's being used | Max Agency #podcast
description_preview:
Gng Sng, Co-Founder and CTO of Cogent Security, reframes how to think about agent context. The real distinction isn't short vs. long — it's active vs. inactive. He walks through how Cogent's context engine builds small graphs that stay "hot" across long-running tasks and even agent handoffs, separate from their high-scale knowledge graph.

This clip is from Max Agency, a #podcast about how the best AI agents are actually being built. Hosted by Harrison Chase, CEO of LangChain, each episode goes

title: Top #1 Opportunity for Senior Engineers: Agentic Engineering
description_preview:
Two engineers. Same agent. Same 200K tokens. Wildly different results. 🔥

That gap IS the opportunity. Karpathy just named agentic engineering at the Sequoia AI Ascent, which means the window where you're early is already closing. By the end of 2026, this is the default. So here's my message to myself, and to you: stop vibe coding and start engineering the system that builds the system.

🎥 VIDEO REFERENCES
• Karpathy Sequoia AI Summit: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=96jN2OCOfLs
• Pi Coding Agen
